commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a CI changes job and helper scripts to skip macOS Swift shards for docs/Markdown-only changes, moves documentation-link validation into Linux lint, and lets the aggregate gate accept intentional macOS skips.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a CI cleanup PR. The after-change behavior is demonstrated by the linked fork Actions run that skips macOS tests for a docs-only proof change and passes the aggregate gate.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the branch-protection-facing CI skip policy and normal merge gating.

target.title: ci: skip macOS shards for docs-only changes
target.body:
## Summary
- add a cheap `changes` job that classifies whether a PR/push can skip macOS Swift test shards
- skip `swift-test-macos` only for docs/Markdown-only changes
- keep documentation link validation in the always-running Linux lint path
- classify `git diff --name-status` entries so renames/copies consider both source and destination paths
- allow the aggregate gate to pass when macOS shards are intentionally skipped

## Why
The current CI still requests four macOS runners for docs-only PRs. macOS queue time is the main remaining source of pending checks, so avoiding those shards for non-code changes reduces queue pressure without weakening validation for source, tests, scripts, workflow, app localization changes, or documentation links.

## Safety
- Source, tests, scripts, workflow, package, and app localization changes still require macOS Swift tests.
- Empty or unavailable base diff falls back to running macOS tests.
- Rename/copy entries classify both old and new paths, so a source-to-docs rename still requires macOS tests.
- `README.md` and provider docs links now run through `Scripts/check-documentation-links.mjs` in Linux lint, preserving the macOS-only `DocumentationLinkTests` coverage for docs-only skips.
- The aggregate job accepts only `success` or intentional `skipped` for the macOS matrix.

## Validation
- workflow YAML parsed with `yaml.safe_load`
- `bash -n Scripts/ci_macos_test_gate.sh`
- `bash -n Scripts/lint.sh`
- `node --check Scripts/check-documentation-links.mjs`
- `node Scripts/check-documentation-links.mjs` -> `documentation links OK: 114 local links`
- `./Scripts/lint.sh lint-linux` -> includes docs link check and SwiftLint, found 0 violations
- `git diff --check`
- docs-only name-status sample (`M\tREADME.md`, `M\tdocs/providers.md`) prints: `Skipping macOS Swift tests for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
- source sample (`M\tSources/CodexBarCore/UsageStore.swift`) prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- script/workflow sample (`M\t.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `M\tScripts/lint.sh`) prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- app localization sample (`M\tSources/CodexBar/Resources/zh-Hans.lproj/Localizable.strings`) prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- empty changed-path list conservatively prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- source-to-docs rename sample (`R100\tSources/CodexBarCore/Old.swift\tdocs/old.md`) prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- docs-to-docs rename sample (`R100\tdocs/old.md\tdocs/new.md`) prints: `Skipping macOS Swift tests for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
- legacy one-path-per-line docs sample still prints: `Skipping macOS Swift tests for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
- attempted `swift test --filter DocumentationLinkTests` locally; interrupted after a long first debug build because equivalent docs-link validation now runs in Linux lint and passed locally/CI

## GitHub Actions proof
Docs-only proof PR: https://github.com/Yuxin-Qiao/CodexBar/pull/3

At run https://github.com/Yuxin-Qiao/CodexBar/actions/runs/27832419332:
- `changes`: success
- `lint`: success
- `swift-test-macos`: skipped
- `lint-build-test`: success
- `build-linux-cli` x64/arm64: success

This proof PR targets the branch from this PR and changes only `docs/ci-path-gate-proof.md`, so it exercises the docs-only path that this PR is designed to optimize.

Relevant log excerpts:
- `changes` logged `Changed paths:` followed by `- A\tdocs/ci-path-gate-proof.md`
- `changes` logged `Skipping macOS Swift tests for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
- `lint` logged `documentation links OK: 114 local links`
- `lint` logged `Done linting! Found 0 violations, 0 serious in 1154 files.`
- `lint-build-test` evaluated the macOS job result as `skipped`
- `lint-build-test` logged `Lint passed; macOS Swift tests skipped for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
target.author: yuxin-qiao
